title: Generate Parentheses
content:
Given n pairs of parentheses, write a function to generate all combinations of well-formed parentheses.

Example 1:

Input: n = 3
Output: ["((()))","(()())","(())()","()(())","()()()"]
Example 2:

Input: n = 1
Output: ["()"]

Constraints:

• 1 <= n <= 8

solutions.explanation: Backtracking with constraints: open count <= n, close count <= open count at any point.
solutions.complexity: Time: O(4^n / sqrt(n)) - Catalan number. Space: O(n) recursion depth.
